title: IMG 0498 - Primary facade refine first
analysis: Best actual raw facade source. Centered signboard, readable Hamza Express identity, open entrance, storefront depth. Remove street clutter and lift exposure without changing signage.

title: IMG 0497 - Wide storefront context
analysis: Wider location proof with neighboring Zia board. Useful for Maps trust, but needs crop, car/clutter control, and cleaner foreground.

title: IMG 0500 - Straight facade variant
analysis: Good centered exterior and entrance. Similar to primary but slightly less clean; keep as second exterior upload.

title: IMG 0501 - Angled sign and counter
analysis: Strong diagonal facade angle with counter visibility. Good platform gallery image after brightening and perspective correction.

title: IMG 0504 - Angled facade alternate
analysis: Good alternate exterior with visible service counter. Keep if we want 5 exterior options in a 16-photo ambience pack.

title: Enhanced facade reference - HE 01
analysis: Already enhanced facade mood reference. Looks premium and warm; use as target style, but verify realism before direct platform upload.

title: Enhanced neon heritage wall
analysis: Strongest interior ambience asset. Communicates 1918 heritage and late-night warmth. Use across dining platforms.

title: Enhanced heritage counter
analysis: Counter/display proof with warm lighting and menu wall. Good trust-building image for dine-in discovery.

title: Enhanced counter with staff
analysis: Adds live service context. Keep because platforms need proof the outlet is active, not just a staged interior.

title: Enhanced dine-in floor
analysis: Best seating proof. Required for EazyDiner and Zomato Dining because guests need to see dine-in comfort.

title: IMG 0480 - Raw seating aisle
analysis: New real seating angle distinct from enhanced finals. Needs exposure/vertical correction. Good 12-16 set filler after enhancement.

title: IMG 0488 - Raw counter walkway
analysis: Shows wall, menu panels, counter depth. Keep if enhanced to reduce yellow cast and straighten verticals.

title: IMG 0492 - Raw counter front
analysis: Good counter-front proof, warm and recognizable. Needs crop and brightness control.

title: IMG 0506 - Raw booth seating
analysis: Useful booth seating angle with wall menu visuals. Good candidate after perspective cleanup.

title: IMG 0514 - Raw display counter
analysis: Display counter and menu-board proof. Useful operational photo for listing trust.

title: IMG 0515 - Raw dine-in table
analysis: Backup seating/table angle. Keep only if enhancement makes it cleaner than similar booth images.

title: GBP facade listing reference 134
analysis: Already in listing reference. Useful style/mood reference.

title: GBP facade listing reference 147 duplicate
analysis: Duplicate content of GBP facade reference, retained for audit but not a separate upload asset.

title: Gemini enhanced IMG 0501 - v1 warm facade style
platform: Internal review for GMB, EazyDiner, Zomato Dining, Swiggy Dineout
analysis: First Gemini Pro pass. Strong warm storefront mood but widened the composition too much; keep as style benchmark, not upload-ready.

title: Gemini enhanced IMG 0501 - v2 portrait faithful
platform: Internal review for GMB, EazyDiner, Zomato Dining, Swiggy Dineout
analysis: Second Gemini Pro pass. Better preservation of the original portrait angle with warm listing-ready facade/interior grade; review before platform upload.

title: Gemini enhanced IMG 0501 - v3 brighter warm entrance
platform: Internal review for GMB, EazyDiner, Zomato Dining, Swiggy Dineout
analysis: Controlled local grade from V2. Entrance, counter, and interior are brighter while keeping the warm Hamza ambience and original portrait composition. Best current review candidate if brightness is the priority.

title: Gemini enhanced IMG 0497 - v1 warm storefront context
platform: GMB gallery + Zomato Dining + EazyDiner facade proof
analysis: Wide storefront context with brighter sign, entrance, and counter visibility while preserving the real facade geometry and neighboring Zia board. Selected for platform review.

title: Gemini enhanced IMG 0480 - v2 seating aisle geometry lock
analysis: Portrait geometry-locked warm ambience pass. Keeps the seating aisle, booth depth, ceiling, and floor pattern intact while lifting warmth and brightness.

title: Gemini enhanced IMG 0488 - v2 counter walkway geometry lock
analysis: Portrait geometry-locked warm ambience pass for the counter walkway and seating depth. Brighter without changing the real counter, table, and menu-board layout.

title: Gemini enhanced IMG 0492 - v2 counter front geometry lock
analysis: Counter-front proof with warmer lights and cleaner brightness. The crop, ceiling, display counter, wall fan, and floor geometry remain intact.

title: Gemini enhanced IMG 0506 - v2 booth seating geometry lock
analysis: Booth seating angle enhanced for warm platform ambience while preserving the menu-board wall, table, booth, and counter positions.

title: Gemini enhanced IMG 0514 - v2 display counter geometry lock
analysis: Display-counter proof enhanced for brightness, glass visibility, and warm listing trust while keeping the original menu boards and counter geometry.

title: Gemini enhanced IMG 0515 - v2 table seating geometry lock
analysis: Backup seating/table angle enhanced with a warm bright finish while preserving the real table, booth, display case, and wall menu arrangement.
